req.title: KYC refresh (idempotency variant)
req.statement: A customer shall complete a KYC refresh every 365 days; accounts beyond refresh window shall be restricted to inbound transactions only. The operation must be idempotent: duplicate submission with the same Idempotency-Key must return the original result.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
```python
"""
Pytest test suite for KYC Refresh Requirements:
- Customer must complete KYC refresh every 365 days
- Accounts beyond refresh window are restricted to inbound transactions only
- Duplicate submissions with the same Idempotency-Key must return the original result
"""

import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from uuid import uuid4

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models / constants (assumed from application under test)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
from kyc_service import (
    KYCService,
    KYCRefreshRequest,
    KYCRefreshResult,
    AccountStatus,
    TransactionType,
    KYCStatus,
    IdempotencyStore,
    AccountRepository,
    KYCRefreshError,
    DuplicateIdempotencyKeyError,
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helpers / Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

UTC = timezone.utc
REFRESH_WINDOW_DAYS = 365


def make_idempotency_key() -> str:
    return str(uuid4())


def days_ago(n: int) -> datetime:
    return datetime.now(UTC) - timedelta(days=n)


def days_from_now(n: int) -> datetime:
    return datetime.now(UTC) + timedelta(days=n)


@pytest.fixture
def idempotency_store():
    """In-memory idempotency store mock."""
    return MagicMock(spec=IdempotencyStore)


@pytest.fixture
def account_repository():
    """Account repository mock."""
    return MagicMock(spec=AccountRepository)


@pytest.fixture
def kyc_service(idempotency_store, account_repository):
    """KYCService wired with mocked dependencies."""
    return KYCService(
        idempotency_store=idempotency_store,
        account_repository=account_repository,
    )


def _make_account(
    account_id: str = "ACC-001",
    last_kyc_date: datetime | None = None,
    status: AccountStatus = AccountStatus.ACTIVE,
):
    account = MagicMock()
    account.account_id = account_id
    account.last_kyc_completed_at = last_kyc_date
    account.status = status
    return account


def _make_request(
    account_id: str = "ACC-001",
    customer_id: str = "CUST-001",
    idempotency_key: str | None = None,
) -> KYCRefreshRequest:
    return KYCRefreshRequest(
        account_id=account_id,
        customer_id=customer_id,
        idempotency_key=idempotency_key or make_idempotency_key(),
        submitted_at=datetime.now(UTC),
    )


# ===========================================================================
# 1. KYC REFRESH WINDOW — 365-DAY REQUIREMENT
# ===========================================================================


class TestKYCRefreshWindow:
    """Tests that verify the 365-day refresh cycle logic."""

    def test_account_within_refresh_window_is_compliant(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """An account whose last KYC was completed < 365 days ago must be compliant."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(364))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        request = _make_request(account_id=account.account_id)
        result = kyc_service.check_kyc_status(request)

        assert result.kyc_status == KYCStatus.COMPLIANT
        assert result.days_until_expiry >= 1

    def test_account_kyc_expires_exactly_at_365_days(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """An account whose last KYC was completed exactly 365 days ago is expired."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(365))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        request = _make_request(account_id=account.account_id)
        result = kyc_service.check_kyc_status(request)

        assert result.kyc_status == KYCStatus.EXPIRED

    def test_account_kyc_expired_beyond_365_days(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """An account whose last KYC was completed > 365 days ago is expired."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(400))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        request = _make_request(account_id=account.account_id)
        result = kyc_service.check_kyc_status(request)

        assert result.kyc_status == KYCStatus.EXPIRED
        assert result.days_until_expiry < 0

    def test_account_with_no_kyc_ever_is_expired(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """An account that has never had a KYC completion must be treated as expired."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=None)
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        request = _make_request(account_id=account.account_id)
        result = kyc_service.check_kyc_status(request)

        assert result.kyc_status == KYCStatus.EXPIRED

    def test_successful_kyc_refresh_resets_expiry_window(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """After a successful refresh the next expiry should be ~365 days from now."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(400))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        request = _make_request(account_id=account.account_id)
        result = kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        assert result.success is True
        assert result.next_kyc_due_date is not None
        expected_due = datetime.now(UTC) + timedelta(days=REFRESH_WINDOW_DAYS)
        delta = abs((result.next_kyc_due_date - expected_due).total_seconds())
        assert delta < 5, "Next KYC due date should be ~365 days from submission"

    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        "days_since_kyc, expected_status",
        [
            (0, KYCStatus.COMPLIANT),
            (1, KYCStatus.COMPLIANT),
            (180, KYCStatus.COMPLIANT),
            (364, KYCStatus.COMPLIANT),
            (365, KYCStatus.EXPIRED),
            (366, KYCStatus.EXPIRED),
            (730, KYCStatus.EXPIRED),
        ],
    )
    def test_kyc_status_boundary_values(
        self,
        kyc_service,
        account_repository,
        idempotency_store,
        days_since_kyc,
        expected_status,
    ):
        """Boundary-value analysis for the 365-day refresh window."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(days_since_kyc))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        request = _make_request(account_id=account.account_id)
        result = kyc_service.check_kyc_status(request)

        assert result.kyc_status == expected_status, (
            f"Expected {expected_status} for {days_since_kyc} days since last KYC"
        )


# ===========================================================================
# 2. ACCOUNT RESTRICTION — INBOUND TRANSACTIONS ONLY
# ===========================================================================


class TestAccountRestriction:
    """Tests that verify expired-KYC accounts are restricted to inbound only."""

    def test_expired_kyc_account_is_restricted(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """An account with expired KYC must have status RESTRICTED."""
        account = _make_account(
            last_kyc_date=days_ago(400), status=AccountStatus.ACTIVE
        )
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        kyc_service.enforce_kyc_restrictions(account.account_id)

        account_repository.update_status.assert_called_once_with(
            account.account_id, AccountStatus.RESTRICTED
        )

    def test_compliant_account_is_not_restricted(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """An account within the KYC window must not have its status changed."""
        account = _make_account(
            last_kyc_date=days_ago(100), status=AccountStatus.ACTIVE
        )
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account

        kyc_service.enforce_kyc_restrictions(account.account_id)

        account_repository.update_status.assert_not_called()

    def test_restricted_account_allows_inbound_transaction(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository
    ):
        """A restricted account must allow inbound (credit) transactions."""
        account = _make_account(
            last_kyc_date=days_ago(400), status=AccountStatus.RESTRICTED
        )
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account

        allowed = kyc_service.is_transaction_permitted(
            account_id=account.account_id,
            transaction_type=TransactionType.INBOUND,
        )

        assert allowed is True

    def test_restricted_account_blocks_outbound_transaction(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository
    ):
        """A restricted account must block outbound (debit) transactions."""
        account = _make_account(
            last_kyc_date=days_ago(400), status=AccountStatus.RESTRICTED
        )
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account

        allowed = kyc_service.is_transaction_permitted(
            account_id=account.account_id,
            transaction_type=TransactionType.OUTBOUND,
        )

        assert allowed is False

    def test_restricted_account_blocks_internal_transfer_out(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository
    ):
        """A restricted account must block outgoing internal transfers."""
        account = _make_account(
            last_kyc_date=days_ago(400), status=AccountStatus.RESTRICTED
        )
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account

        allowed = kyc_service.is_transaction_permitted(
            account_id=account.account_id,
            transaction_type=TransactionType.INTERNAL_TRANSFER_OUT,
        )

        assert allowed is False

    def test_active_account_allows_outbound_transaction(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository
    ):
        """An active (compliant) account must allow outbound transactions."""
        account = _make_account(
            last_kyc_date=days_ago(100), status=AccountStatus.ACTIVE
        )
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account

        allowed = kyc_service.is_transaction_permitted(
            account_id=account.account_id,
            transaction_type=TransactionType.OUTBOUND,
        )

        assert allowed is True

    def test_restriction_lifted_after_successful_kyc_refresh(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """Once KYC refresh is submitted successfully, account restriction is removed."""
        account = _make_account(
            last_kyc_date=days_ago(400), status=AccountStatus.RESTRICTED
        )
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        request = _make_request(account_id=account.account_id)
        result = kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        assert result.success is True
        account_repository.update_status.assert_called_with(
            account.account_id, AccountStatus.ACTIVE
        )

    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        "transaction_type, account_status, expected_permitted",
        [
            (TransactionType.INBOUND, AccountStatus.RESTRICTED, True),
            (TransactionType.OUTBOUND, AccountStatus.RESTRICTED, False),
            (TransactionType.INTERNAL_TRANSFER_OUT, AccountStatus.RESTRICTED, False),
            (TransactionType.INTERNAL_TRANSFER_IN, AccountStatus.RESTRICTED, True),
            (TransactionType.INBOUND, AccountStatus.ACTIVE, True),
            (TransactionType.OUTBOUND, AccountStatus.ACTIVE, True),
            (TransactionType.INTERNAL_TRANSFER_OUT, AccountStatus.ACTIVE, True),
            (TransactionType.INTERNAL_TRANSFER_IN, AccountStatus.ACTIVE, True),
        ],
    )
    def test_transaction_permission_matrix(
        self,
        kyc_service,
        account_repository,
        transaction_type,
        account_status,
        expected_permitted,
    ):
        """Parametrised permission matrix for restricted vs. active accounts."""
        account = _make_account(status=account_status)
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account

        permitted = kyc_service.is_transaction_permitted(
            account_id=account.account_id,
            transaction_type=transaction_type,
        )

        assert permitted is expected_permitted, (
            f"{transaction_type} on {account_status} account: "
            f"expected permitted={expected_permitted}"
        )


# ===========================================================================
# 3. IDEMPOTENCY
# ===========================================================================


class TestIdempotency:
    """Tests that verify duplicate submissions with the same Idempotency-Key
    return the original result without side effects."""

    def test_first_submission_stores_result_in_idempotency_store(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """The first call must persist its result keyed by Idempotency-Key."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(400))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None  # no prior record

        request = _make_request()
        kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        idempotency_store.save.assert_called_once()
        saved_key = idempotency_store.save.call_args[0][0]
        assert saved_key == request.idempotency_key

    def test_duplicate_submission_returns_original_result(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """A duplicate call with the same key must return the cached result."""
        idempotency_key = make_idempotency_key()
        original_result = KYCRefreshResult(
            success=True,
            account_id="ACC-001",
            idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
            processed_at=datetime.now(UTC),
            next_kyc_due_date=days_from_now(365),
        )
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = original_result

        request = _make_request(idempotency_key=idempotency_key)
        result = kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        assert result == original_result
        account_repository.get_by_id.assert_not_called()
        account_repository.update_status.assert_not_called()

    def test_duplicate_submission_does_not_update_account(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """Duplicate call must not trigger any account update side effects."""
        idempotency_key = make_idempotency_key()
        cached = KYCRefreshResult(
            success=True,
            account_id="ACC-002",
            idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
            processed_at=days_ago(1),
            next_kyc_due_date=days_from_now(364),
        )
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = cached

        request = _make_request(account_id="ACC-002", idempotency_key=idempotency_key)
        kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        account_repository.update_status.assert_not_called()
        account_repository.save.assert_not_called()

    def test_duplicate_idempotency_key_not_saved_twice(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """The idempotency store must only be written once per unique key."""
        idempotency_key = make_idempotency_key()
        cached = KYCRefreshResult(
            success=True,
            account_id="ACC-001",
            idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
            processed_at=days_ago(0),
            next_kyc_due_date=days_from_now(365),
        )
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = cached

        request = _make_request(idempotency_key=idempotency_key)
        kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        idempotency_store.save.assert_not_called()

    def test_different_idempotency_keys_produce_independent_results(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """Two different keys must be treated as independent operations."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(400))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None  # no cache for either key

        key_a = make_idempotency_key()
        key_b = make_idempotency_key()

        result_a = kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(_make_request(idempotency_key=key_a))
        result_b = kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(_make_request(idempotency_key=key_b))

        assert result_a.idempotency_key != result_b.idempotency_key
        assert idempotency_store.save.call_count == 2

    def test_idempotent_result_preserves_original_processed_at_timestamp(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """Duplicate calls must not alter the original `processed_at` timestamp."""
        idempotency_key = make_idempotency_key()
        original_timestamp = days_ago(2)
        cached = KYCRefreshResult(
            success=True,
            account_id="ACC-001",
            idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
            processed_at=original_timestamp,
            next_kyc_due_date=days_from_now(363),
        )
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = cached

        request = _make_request(idempotency_key=idempotency_key)
        result = kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        assert result.processed_at == original_timestamp

    def test_idempotent_result_preserves_original_next_due_date(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """Duplicate calls must return the same `next_kyc_due_date` as the original."""
        idempotency_key = make_idempotency_key()
        original_due_date = days_from_now(300)
        cached = KYCRefreshResult(
            success=True,
            account_id="ACC-001",
            idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
            processed_at=days_ago(65),
            next_kyc_due_date=original_due_date,
        )
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = cached

        request = _make_request(idempotency_key=idempotency_key)
        result = kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        assert result.next_kyc_due_date == original_due_date

    def test_missing_idempotency_key_raises_error(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """Submitting without an Idempotency-Key must raise a validation error."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(400))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account

        with pytest.raises((KYCRefreshError, ValueError)):
            kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(
                KYCRefreshRequest(
                    account_id="ACC-001",
                    customer_id="CUST-001",
                    idempotency_key=None,  # deliberately absent
                    submitted_at=datetime.now(UTC),
                )
            )


# ===========================================================================
# 4. EDGE CASES & ERROR HANDLING
# ===========================================================================


class TestEdgeCasesAndErrorHandling:
    """Covers corner cases and failure modes."""

    def test_non_existent_account_raises_error(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """Submitting a refresh for an unknown account must raise an error."""
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = None
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        with pytest.raises(KYCRefreshError, match="Account not found"):
            kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(_make_request(account_id="GHOST-999"))

    def test_refresh_on_already_compliant_account_is_accepted(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """Refreshing a still-compliant account should succeed (early renewal)."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(100))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        request = _make_request()
        result = kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        assert result.success is True

    def test_restriction_applied_only_once_for_already_restricted_account(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """Calling enforce_kyc_restrictions on an already-restricted account
        must not duplicate the status update."""
        account = _make_account(
            last_kyc_date=days_ago(400), status=AccountStatus.RESTRICTED
        )
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account

        kyc_service.enforce_kyc_restrictions(account.account_id)

        # Should still call update (idempotent write), or not call at all —
        # either way the final status must not regress.
        if account_repository.update_status.called:
            account_repository.update_status.assert_called_with(
                account.account_id, AccountStatus.RESTRICTED
            )

    def test_kyc_refresh_stores_correct_account_id_in_result(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """The result must reference the same account_id that was submitted."""
        account = _make_account(account_id="ACC-XYZ", last_kyc_date=days_ago(400))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        request = _make_request(account_id="ACC-XYZ")
        result = kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        assert result.account_id == "ACC-XYZ"

    def test_kyc_refresh_result_contains_idempotency_key(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """The returned result must echo the Idempotency-Key."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(400))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        key = make_idempotency_key()
        request = _make_request(idempotency_key=key)
        result = kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        assert result.idempotency_key == key

    def test_concurrent_duplicate_submissions_are_safe(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """Simulate a race condition where the idempotency store raises on
        a concurrent duplicate write; the service must surface the original result."""
        idempotency_key = make_idempotency_key()
        original = KYCRefreshResult(
            success=True,
            account_id="ACC-001",
            idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
            processed_at=datetime.now(UTC),
            next_kyc_due_date=days_from_now(365),
        )

        # First call: nothing in store → proceeds normally → save raises a
        # DuplicateIdempotencyKeyError (concurrent write), service must recover.
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(400))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.side_effect = [None, original]
        idempotency_store.save.side_effect = DuplicateIdempotencyKeyError(original)

        request = _make_request(idempotency_key=idempotency_key)
        result = kyc_service.submit_kyc_refresh(request)

        assert result == original
```

---

## Design Notes

| Area | What the tests verify |
|---|---|
| **365-day window** | Compliant < 365 d; expired ≥ 365 d; `None` date treated as expired; boundary values 0 / 364 / 365 / 366 |
| **Account restriction** | `RESTRICTED` status set on expiry; inbound allowed, outbound/transfer-out blocked; full permission matrix parametrised |
| **Restriction lifted** | `ACTIVE` status restored after successful refresh |
| **Idempotency — happy path** | First call saves to store; result echoes the key & timestamps |
| **Idempotency — duplicate** | Cached result returned verbatim; no account repo side-effects; store not written again |
| **Idempotency — edge** | Missing key raises error; different keys are independent; concurrent write race condition handled |
| **Error handling** | Unknown account; early renewal accepted; already-restricted account safe |

### Running the tests

```bash
pip install pytest pytest-mock
pytest tests/test_kyc_refresh.py -v --tb=short
```

telemetry.raw_response_head:
```python
"""
Pytest test suite for KYC Refresh Requirements:
- Customer must complete KYC refresh every 365 days
- Accounts beyond refresh window are restricted to inbound transactions only
- Duplicate submissions with the same Idempotency-Key must return the original result
"""

import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from uuid import uuid4

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models / constants (assumed from application under test)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
from kyc_service import (
    KYCService,
    KYCRefreshRequest,
    KYCRefreshResult,
    AccountStatus,
    TransactionType,
    KYCStatus,
    IdempotencyStore,
    AccountRepository,
    KYCRefreshError,
    DuplicateIdempotencyKeyError,
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helpers / Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

UTC = timezone.utc
REFRESH_WINDOW_DAYS = 365


def make_idempotency_key() -> str:
    return str(uuid4())


def days_ago(n: int) -> datetime:
    return datetime.now(UTC) - timedelta(days=n)


def days_from_now(n: int) -> datetime:
    return datetime.now(UTC) + timedelta(days=n)


@pytest.fixture
def idempotency_store():
    """In-memory idempotency store mock."""
    return MagicMock(spec=IdempotencyStore)


@pytest.fixture
def account_repository():
    """Account repository mock."""
    return MagicMock(spec=AccountRepository)


@pytest.fixture
def kyc_service(idempotency_store, account_repository):
    """KYCService wired with mocked dependencies."""
    return KYCService(
        idempotency_store=idempotency_store,
        account_repository=account_repository,
    )


def _make_account(
    account_id: str = "ACC-001",
    last_kyc_date: datetime | None = None,
    status: AccountStatus = AccountStatus.ACTIVE,
):
    account = MagicMock()
    account.account_id = account_id
    account.last_kyc_completed_at = last_kyc_date
    account.status = status
    return account


def _make_request(
    account_id: str = "ACC-001",
    customer_id: str = "CUST-001",
    idempotency_key: str | None = None,
) -> KYCRefreshRequest:
    return KYCRefreshRequest(
        account_id=account_id,
        customer_id=customer_id,
        idempotency_key=idempotency_key or make_idempotency_key(),
        submitted_at=datetime.now(UTC),
    )


# ===========================================================================
# 1. KYC REFRESH WINDOW — 365-DAY REQUIREMENT
# ===========================================================================


class TestKYCRefreshWindow:
    """Tests that verify the 365-day refresh cycle logic."""

    def test_account_within_refresh_window_is_compliant(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """An account whose last KYC was completed < 365 days ago must be compliant."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(364))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        request = _make_request(account_id=account.account_id)
        result = kyc_service.check_kyc_status(request)

        assert result.kyc_status == KYCStatus.COMPLIANT
        assert result.days_until_expiry >= 1

    def test_account_kyc_expires_exactly_at_365_days(
        self, kyc_service, account_repository, idempotency_store
    ):
        """An account whose last KYC was completed exactly 365 days ago is expired."""
        account = _make_account(last_kyc_date=days_ago(365))
        account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        idempotency_store.get.return_value = None

        request = _make_request(account_id=account.account_id)
        result = kyc_service.check_kyc_status(request)

        assert result.kyc_status == KYCStatus.EXPIRED
